prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to england and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: The document pertains to the Social Housing Decarbonisation Fund (SHDF), which specifically addresses social housing initiatives and energy performance improvements within England. The emphasis on local authorities and regions indicates its applicability primarily to England.
